reviews.review_description: You should probably just turn off the mediation words and find inner peace just with the visuals.
This app is absolutely Incredible, I love it.  I've done all the meditation apps, I really dig this one.  I will be Tripping with Mood on the Regular.

developer_response.body: You are very kind, Aaron. We are excited about the road ahead and hope to surprise you with many new great updates.

reviews.review_description: Just experienced a VR meditation journey on MOOD. How do I feel? Energized, joyful, expanded!!! The visual journey is like a psychedelic trip enhanced by the musical score. Colorful geometrics pulled my psyche inwards as I experienced spaciousness and the state of simply “being”. Who says meditation needs to be boring!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for meditating with MOOD, Catherine. We hope you continue to enjoy our experiences and many more to come.

reviews.review_description: Fantastic guided meditations. The visuals are beautiful but do not get in the way of the overall experience. It's not overwhelming for beginners and is deep enough for those who are experienced with meditation. Great job!!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your kind words. We are just getting started, and your words mean a lot.

reviews.review_description: I subscribe to Float and another similar app but this one is my favorite and I cannot believe it's FREE. I hope the development continues on it. It's just a perfect, dreamy, floaty experience! This one puts me in the right "MOOD"!
